[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110100111 6
1 0111111101 8
2 0000000101 2
3 0110011000 4
4 1011111001 7
5 1011101111 8
6 1100111100 6
7 0010100010 3

01 10 0010100010 3 match 7
12 21 0110100101 5
23 32 0000000101 2 match 2
34 43 0000000000 a
45 54 0010011000 3
56 65 1011101001 6
67 76 1000101100 4
70 07 0000100000 1

02 20 0010100000 2
13 31 0000000101 2 match 2
24 42 0110011000 4 match 3
35 53 0000000001 1
46 64 0010001000 2
57 75 1000111000 4
60 06 0010100010 3 match 7
71 17 0100100100 3

03 30 0000000000 a
14 41 0110000000 2
25 52 0011111001 6
36 63 0000000101 2 match 2
47 74 0100011000 3
50 05 0010100000 2
61 16 0010100111 5
72 27 0100111100 5

04 40 0010000000 1
15 51 0010100001 3
26 62 0011101101 6
37 73 0000000100 1
[completion]

1 absent

none
